Duplicate Search

Case Actions
What You'll Cover
Duplicate Search
Initial Case Book-In
Follow-Up Handling

This interactive module walks you through each step of entering a new adverse event report into Argus Safety — from the initial duplicate check through successful case book-in.

Case Action — New
Duplicate Search
Performing a Duplicate Search
Slide 2 of 6
Duplicate Search
Before creating any new case, always perform a duplicate search to avoid duplication in Argus.
1
Enter Search Fields
Use any combination of displayed data fields and click Search
2
Literature Reference
Use this section to search for reference numbers and literature cases
3
Start Broad
Use only a few criteria first, then drill down if too many results appear
💡 Note: Argus maintains the last search criteria unless the Clear button is clicked
Argus Preview
Initial Case Entry — Case Search Criteria
© Ultragenic Research & Technologies Private Limited. Strictly Confidential.
Duplicate Search
Navigation
Getting to the Duplicate Search Screen
Slide 3 of 6
Navigation
Navigate to the correct screen and enter key identifying information before running the search.
1
Case Actions > New
Navigate from the top menu or click the [Case Open] icon
2
Enter Key Fields
Report Type, Country, Product, and Event — plus Patient & Reporter if available
3
Clinical Trial Cases
Also enter Protocol Number and Investigator Site ID
4
Click Search
Select [Search] to run the duplicate check — review results before proceeding
Argus Preview
Filled Case Search — Search button highlighted
© Ultragenic Research & Technologies Private Limited. Strictly Confidential.
Duplicate Search
Search Results
Duplicate Found vs. Not Found
Slide 4 of 6
Search Results
Based on search results, Argus guides you down one of two paths.
1
Duplicate Found ✓
New data can be entered directly into the existing case. Treat as a Follow-Up — do NOT create a new case.
2
No Duplicate Found ✗
Select [Continue] to proceed with Book-In of a new case. All mandatory fields must then be completed.
⚠️ Always review match details — score and matched fields — before deciding if it is truly a duplicate
📝 Knowledge Check
If a duplicate is found in Argus, what should you do?
Argus Preview
Case Search — Continue highlighted (no duplicate)
© Ultragenic Research & Technologies Private Limited. Strictly Confidential.
✅ Answer the knowledge check to continue
Initial Case Book-In
Book-In
Completing Mandatory Fields
Slide 5 of 6
Book-In
After confirming no duplicate, complete all mandatory fields before saving the case.
1
Mandatory Fields
Identified by the red flag icon and orange outline — must all be completed
2
Seriousness Criteria
Fill in the BookIn section: Death, Hospitalized, Life-threatening, Disability, Medically Significant
3
Click Book-In
Select [Book-In] to save the case in Argus and generate a new case number
🚫 Argus will not allow Book-In until all mandatory fields are populated
Argus Preview
Book-In screen with Seriousness Criteria
© Ultragenic Research & Technologies Private Limited. Strictly Confidential.
Initial Case Book-In
Next Steps
After the Case is Successfully Booked
Slide 6 of 6
Next Steps
Once booked-in, a new case number is generated, and you have two options.
1
Open Case (Yes)
Continue with full data entry immediately — requires appropriate user permissions
2
Close Case (No)
The case moves to the Worklist for processing by another team member
🔑 User permissions determine whether you can continue data entry immediately after Book-In
📝 Knowledge Check
What happens to the case if you select "No" after Book-In?
Argus Preview
Case Created confirmation — Yes / No dialog
© Ultragenic Research & Technologies Private Limited. Strictly Confidential.
✅ Answer the knowledge check to finish
